# Billederapport

> Billederapport is a Danish-built mobile photo-report app for tradespeople, inspectors, surveyors and small field-service teams. Users take photos on a phone, annotate them, fill in checklists, and send a branded PDF report to the customer by email — all from the job site, including offline. It runs in the browser as a PWA (no install, no app store). Pricing is a single flat plan at 199 DKK/month with a 14-day free trial and no credit card required. Data is hosted in the EU and the product is GDPR-compliant.

## Product summary

- Audience: Danish tradespeople, building inspectors, surveyors, damage assessors, service technicians, sole-traders and small teams.
- Core use cases: inspection reports, damage documentation (skadesrapport), oversight/tilsyn, service and maintenance reports, property condition reports.
- Differentiators: works fully offline; EU/GDPR hosting; branded PDF emailed directly to the client; Danish-language UI and Danish-language support; no install (browser PWA); flat monthly price; unlimited reports/photos/templates/customers.
- Platforms: any modern mobile browser (iOS Safari, Android Chrome) and desktop. Installable as a PWA.
- Pricing: 199 DKK / month, ex VAT. 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
- Languages: Danish (primary). Support is in Danish.
- Marketing site: https://billederapport.dk
- Application: https://app.billederapport.dk

## Key URLs

- [Marketing home (Danish)](https://billederapport.dk/): Product overview, features, how it works, pricing, FAQ.
- [Skadesrapport-app (Danish)](https://billederapport.dk/skadesrapport-app/): Use-case page for damage assessment, insurance and skadesservice — timestamped photos, offline, branded PDF to customer and insurer.
- [Web app](https://app.billederapport.dk): The Billederapport application — sign in or start the 14-day trial.
- [Sign up](https://app.billederapport.dk/signup): Start a 14-day free trial without a credit card.
- [Sign in](https://app.billederapport.dk/login): Sign in to an existing account.

## Optional

- [Full content (markdown)](https://billederapport.dk/llms-full.txt): Markdown copy of the marketing page, ready for LLM ingestion.
- [Sample report (PDF)](https://billederapport.dk/assets/report/Rottespaerre_servicekontrol_Sokrogvej_7.pdf): Example of the branded PDF report the app generates — 3-page rat-barrier service check, with cover, customer info, annotated photo points, and a severity badge.
- [Sitemap](https://billederapport.dk/sitemap.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://billederapport.dk/robots.txt)
